summary:
• Hormuz Strait transit risks are intensifying supply concerns as ceasefire deadlines loom and tensions escalate, with potential Iranian involvement threatening critical oil chokepoint flows to Western markets.

• Multiple geopolitical flashpoints—including U.S.-Iran tensions, sanctions dynamics, and potential wider regional conflict—are creating sustained crude price volatility and forcing trading patterns away from normal market mechanisms.

• North American production capacity is contracting with eight consecutive weeks of rig losses, limiting domestic supply growth precisely when import dependence and international supply disruptions are increasing risk exposure.

articles.title: Eni finds 5tcf of gas in Indonesia’s Kutei Basin
articles.description: Italian energy firm Eni has discovered approximately five trillion cubic feet (tcf) of gas in place with its Geliga‑1 exploration well in the Ganal block, offshore Indonesia’s Kutei Basin.
